## Description
Provide a clear and concise description of what the issue is.

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Steps to Reproduce (For Bug Reports)
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Screenshots / Code Snippets (if applicable)
Add any relevant screenshots or code snippets to help explain the issue.

## Environment Details
* OS: (e.g., Windows, macOS, Linux)
* Browser: (e.g., Chrome, Safari, Firefox)
* Client Version: (e.g., Vue v3.x, Client v1.x)
* Server Version: (e.g., Frappe v15.x)
